system_boundary.name: Daily API
system_boundary.description: Backend service providing the daily.dev developer news feed, GraphQL API, background event processing, and community engagement layer.

containers.name: API Server
containers.description: Fastify HTTP server hosting the Mercurius GraphQL endpoint, REST routes (RSS, webhooks, devcards, boot), and the /v1 compatibility layer.

containers.name: Background Worker
containers.description: Google Pub/Sub subscriber process that handles domain events — reputation updates, notifications, CDC replication, digest emails, and content image processing.

containers.name: Cron Runner
containers.description: Single-shot process that runs a named cron handler; deployed as Kubernetes CronJob.

containers.name: Temporal Worker
containers.description: Temporal workflow worker that executes notification delivery workflows and activities.

external_systems.name: PostgreSQL
external_systems.description: Primary relational database with master/replica replication for all domain entities.

external_systems.name: Redis
external_systems.description: Cache, Pub/Sub relay, rate limiting, and real-time subscription transport.

external_systems.name: Google Cloud Pub/Sub
external_systems.description: Async event bus used to dispatch background worker jobs from the API.

external_systems.name: ClickHouse
external_systems.description: Columnar database for post analytics events and user profile analytics.

external_systems.name: Temporal
external_systems.description: Durable workflow orchestration for notification delivery workflows.

external_systems.name: Customer.io
external_systems.description: Transactional and marketing email delivery for user events.

external_systems.name: OneSignal
external_systems.description: Mobile and web push notification delivery.

relationships.description: Reads and writes domain entities via TypeORM
Caches resolver results and relays GraphQL subscriptions
Publishes domain events to trigger background workers
Writes post view and analytics events
Reads and writes domain data during event processing
Updates cached counters and triggers real-time events
Syncs user lifecycle events for emails
Delivers push notifications on user events
Reads and updates data for scheduled maintenance tasks
Polls for and executes workflow tasks
Executes notification activities that read user and notification data

people_container_mappings.description: Sends GraphQL queries and mutations over HTTPS
Reads public feed content over HTTPS
